question: Which are the modules or stages studied during the life cycle assessment of a product?
ground_truth:
The modules or stages studied in the life cycle assessment of a product include:
- Module A1: Retrieval of raw materials
- Module A2: Transportation of raw materials
- Module A3: Core activities of the DecoralÂ® Group's facilities
- Module A4: Road transportation of the declared unit (1 m2 of sheet metal and packaging) to the installation site
- Module A5: Installation process of 1 m2 of sheet metal on-site
- Module C1: Removal of sheets at the end of their useful life or at the end of the building in which they are installed
- Module C2: Transportation of end-of-life products to waste treatment centers
- Module C3: Preparation and treatment processes of waste for recycling or energy recovery
- Module C4: Disposal of inert product in landfill
- Module D: Potential environmental loads and benefits related to material reuse, recovery, and recycling.
